use_cases: Hero section background animation for landing pages
Ambient visual element for dark-themed interfaces
Decorative backdrop for creative portfolio websites
Abstract visual accent for digital product showcases
ai_summary: A dark-themed abstract animation featuring 81 blue boxes arranged in a grid with staggered animation delays creating a continuous wave-like effect. The component uses a black background with a cyan-blue (#5BC2E7) color scheme, producing a calming yet dynamic visual rhythm. Designed as a standalone visual component suitable for backgrounds, hero sections, or ambient decorative elements.
